title: Security: v8: corrupt typed array from bad deserializer input
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
V8's deserializer normally rejects malformed input but it can be coerced into producing typed arrays with a non-resizable ArrayBuffer and the is_length_tracking or is_backed_by_rab flags set.  
  
**VERSION**   
V8 Version: 10.1.124.8-node.13 but looks present in ToT  
O
